skippedRequiresReview.fragment: Must also add Ship To BAC 184590 (Dealer code 31-728). Available on SOLD orders only. Not available with LPO wheels.

unresolvedRpoMentions.fragment: Not available with (SFZ) Dark Stealth crossed flags emblems, LPO, (EYK) Chrome Exterior Badge Package, any Full Length Dual Racing Stripes (DPB, DPC, DPG, DPL, DPT, DSY, DSZ, DT0, DTB, DTH, DUB, DUE, DUK, DUW) or Grand Sport Heritage Center Stripes (DMU, DMV, DMW, DMX, DMY).

Not available with (EYK) Chrome Exterior Badge Package or any Full Length Dual Racing Stripes (DPB, DPC, DPG, DPL, DPT, DSY, DSZ, DT0, DTB, DTH, DUB, DUE, DUK, DUW) or Grand Sport Heritage Center Stripes (DMU, DMV, DMW, DMX, DMY).

Not available at start of production. Not available with any Full Length Dual Racing Stripes (DPB, DPC, DPG, DPL, DPT, DSY, DSZ, DT0, DTB, DTH, DUB, DUE, DUK, DUW) or Grand Sport Heritage Center Stripes (DMU, DMV, DMW, DMX, DMY).
Not available with RPO stripes (DPB, DPC, DPG, DPL, DPT, DSY, DSZ, DT0, DTB, DTH, DUB, DUE, DUK, DUW, DZU, DZV, DZX) or (Z15) Grand Sport Heritage Graphics.

specialPackageMentions.detail_raw: 1. Included with (FEY) Z52 Track Performance Package.

1. Requires (Z15) Grand Sport Heritage Graphics.
2. Requires (Z15) Grand Sport Heritage Graphics. Note: When (D84) Carbon Flash painted nacelles and roof is ordered (required or selected) roof will not include the stripe.

1. Requires (Z15) Grand Sport Heritage Graphics. Not available with exterior color (GKA) Blade Silver Metallic. 
2. Requires (Z15) Grand Sport Heritage Graphics. Requires (D84) Carbon Flash painted nacelles and roof when the following exterior colors are ordered: G26/G4Z/GBK/GKZ/GPH. Not available with exterior color (GKA) Blade Silver Metallic. Note: When (D84) Carbon Flash painted nacelles and roof is ordered (required or selected) roof will not include the stripe.

1. Requires (Z15) Grand Sport Heritage Graphics. Not available with exterior color (G8G) Arctic White. 
2. Requires (Z15) Grand Sport Heritage Graphics. Requires (D84) Carbon Flash painted nacelles and roof when the following exterior colors are ordered: G26/G4Z/GBK. Not available with exterior color (G8G) Arctic White. Note: When (D84) Carbon Flash painted nacelles and roof is ordered (required or selected) roof will not include the stripe.

1. Requires (Z15) Grand Sport Heritage Graphics. Not available with exterior color (GTR) Admiral Blue Metallic.
2. Requires (Z15) Grand Sport Heritage Graphics. Requires (D84) Carbon Flash painted nacelles and roof when the following exterior colors are ordered: G26/G4Z/GBK/GKZ/GPH. Not available with exterior color (GTR) Admiral Blue Metallic. Note: When (D84) Carbon Flash painted nacelles and roof is ordered (required or selected) roof will not include the stripe.

1. Requires (Z15) Grand Sport Heritage Graphics. Not available with exterior color (GKZ) Torch Red or (GPH) Red Mist Metallic Tintcoat. 
2. Requires (Z15) Grand Sport Heritage Graphics. Requires (D84) Carbon Flash painted nacelles and roof when the following exterior colors are ordered: G26/G4Z/GBK/GTR. Not available with exterior color (GKZ) Torch Red or (GPH) Red Mist Metallic Tintcoat. Note: When (D84) Carbon Flash painted nacelles and roof is ordered (required or selected) roof will not include the stripe.
1. Requires (Z15) Grand Sport Heritage Graphics. Not available with exterior color (GKA) Blade Silver Metallic.
1. Requires (Z15) Grand Sport Heritage Graphics. Not available with exterior color (GTR) Admiral Blue Metallic.
1. Requires (Z15) Grand Sport Heritage Graphics. Not available with exterior color (GBK) Competition Yellow Tintcoat Metallic.
1. Requires (Z15) Grand Sport Heritage Graphics. Not available with exterior color (GKZ) Torch Red or (GPH) Red Mist Metallic Tintcoat
1. Requires (Z15) Grand Sport Heritage Graphics.
1. Requires (Z15) Grand Sport Heritage Graphics. Not available with exterior color (GKZ) Torch Red or (GPH) Red Mist Metallic Tintcoat
1. Included and only available with (FEY) Z52 Track Performance Package.
1. Included with (FEY) Z52 Track Performance Package.
1. Requires (FEB) Z52 Sport Performance Package and (J57) carbon ceramic brakes or Included with (FEY) Z52 Track Performance Package.

1. Not recommended with (HUQ, HU7, HUL, HUR) Adrenaline Red interiors. 
2. Not recommended with (HU2, HUA, HUU, HZP) Adrenaline Red interiors, (HNK) Adrenaline Red Dipped interior, (HUF, HZN) Natural Dipped interiors, (HVZ) Asymmetrical Adrenaline Red/Jet Black interior, (EJH, EPX) Very Dark Atmosphere interiors, (HAG) Asymmetrical Santorini Blue/Jet Black interior or (EL9) Santorini Blue Dipped with Red accents interior. Included with (HUW, HUX) Habanero interiors.

1. (HZN, HUF) Natural Dipped interior comes with (3N9) Natural seat belt color; (H8T) Santorini Blue interior and (HAG) Asymmetrical Santorini Blue/Jet Black interior comes with (3A9) Santorini Blue seat belt color; (HNK) Adrenaline Red Dipped interior and (EL9) Santorini Blue Dipped with Torch Red accents interior comes with (3F9) Torch Red seat belt color; (HUW, HUX) Habanero interior comes with (379) Orange seat belt color.

1. Not recommended with (HUW, HUX) Habanero interiors or (EJH, EPX) Very Dark Atmosphere interiors. Included with (HNK) Adrenaline Red Dipped interior, (EL9) Santorini Blue Dipped with Red accents interior and (Z25) Grand Sport Launch Edition.

1. Not recommended with (HUQ, HU7, HUL, HUR) Adrenaline Red interiors. 
2. Not recommended with (HU2, HUA, HUU, HZP) Adrenaline Red interiors, (HNK) Adrenaline Red Dipped interior, (HVZ) Asymmetrical Adrenaline Red/Jet Black interior, (HUW, HUX) Habanero interiors, (EJH, EPX) Very Dark Atmosphere interiors, (H8T) Santorini Blue interior, (HAG) Asymmetrical Santorini Blue/Jet Black interior or (EL9) Santorini Blue Dipped with Red accents interior.
1. Not available with (T0F) Carbon Flash-painted Carbon Fiber Aero Package or (FEY) Z52 Track Performance Package.

1. (HZN, HUF) Natural Dipped interior comes with (3N9) Natural seat belt color; (H8T) Santorini Blue interior and (HAG) Asymmetrical Santorini Blue/Jet Black interior comes with (3A9) Santorini Blue seat belt color; (HNK) Adrenaline Red Dipped interior and (EL9) Santorini Blue Dipped with Torch Red accents interior comes with (3F9) Torch Red seat belt color; (HUW, HUX) Habanero interior comes with (379) Orange seat belt color.
1. Not available with RPO stripes (DPB, DPC, DPG, DPL, DPT, DSY, DSZ, DT0, DTB, DTH, DUB, DUE, DUK, DUW, DZU, DZV, DZX) or (Z15) Grand Sport Heritage Graphics.
1. Not available with (Z15) Grand Sport Heritage Graphics.

1. Requires one of the following Grand Sport Heritage Hash Marks: (17A) Blade Silver, (20A) Admiral Blue, (55A) Competition Yellow, (75A) Torch Red, (97A) Carbon Flash, and (DX4) Red Mist. Only additional stripes or graphics available with Z15 are (DMU/DMV/DMW/DMX/DMY) Grand Sport Heritage Center Stripes.
